title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Packet Lens: Net Fhrp Vip
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net fhrp vip increment in a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain FHRP virtual IP and gateway failover behavior, election, state, and host transparency.
Trace static or dynamic NAT and PAT translations, direction, state, address conservation, and troubleshooting evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
